case_title: ORTIZ, ORLANDO LOPEZ VS ALDEN, THEODORE J.JR.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, ORLANDO LOPEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALDEN, THEODORE J.JR. $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,272.00, PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE AND IS THEREFORE DISQUALIFIED FROM RECOVERING FOR ANY PROPERTY DAMAGE.
